--- 
title: "Pygo_gene_enrichment"
author: "Galen O'Shea-Stone"
date: "2025-06-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

##############################################################################
## Transcriptomics → GO / KEGG → Reactome enrichment (Gallus gallus)        ##
##############################################################################

## 0.  CONFIGURATION  =========================================================
input_file   <- "pygo_MAIN.csv"       # ← change to your file name
species_name <- "chicken"             # ReactomePA expects this for Gallus gallus
kegg_code    <- "gga"                 # KEGG organism code
padj_cutoff  <- 0.05                  # adjusted-P threshold for “significant”

## 1.  SETUP  -----------------------------------------------------------------
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

cran_extras <- c("ggraph","igraph","graphlayouts","ggforce",
                 "ape","scatterpie")
need_cran <- cran_extras[!sapply(cran_extras, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(need_cran)) install.packages(need_cran, dependencies = TRUE)

bio_pkgs <- c("clusterProfiler","ReactomePA","pathview","biomaRt",
              "AnnotationDbi","dplyr","ggplot2","openxlsx")
need_bio <- bio_pkgs[!sapply(bio_pkgs, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(need_bio)) BiocManager::install(need_bio, update = FALSE, ask = FALSE)

if (!requireNamespace("org.Gg.eg.db", quietly = TRUE))
  BiocManager::install("org.Gg.eg.db", update = FALSE, ask = FALSE)

library(clusterProfiler)
library(ReactomePA)
library(pathview)
library(biomaRt)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)
library(org.Gg.eg.db)
orgDb <- org.Gg.eg.db

dir.create("output", showWarnings = FALSE)

## 2.  READ DIFFERENTIAL EXPRESSION TABLE  ------------------------------------
tbl <- read.csv(input_file, check.names = FALSE) %>%
        rename(gene = 1, logFC = 2, padj = 3)

## 3.  ID-MAPPING (Symbol → Entrez)  ------------------------------------------
gene2entrez <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  orgDb, keys = tbl$gene, columns = "ENTREZID", keytype = "SYMBOL"
)

tbl <- left_join(tbl, gene2entrez, by = c("gene" = "SYMBOL")) %>%
       filter(!is.na(ENTREZID))

gene_universe <- as.character(tbl$ENTREZID)
sig_genes     <- tbl %>% filter(padj < padj_cutoff) %>% pull(ENTREZID) %>% as.character()

## 4.  OVER-REPRESENTATION ANALYSES  ------------------------------------------
## 4a. GO BP ORA
ego <- enrichGO(gene = sig_genes, universe = gene_universe,
                OrgDb = orgDb, ont = "BP", pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                readable = TRUE)

## 4b. KEGG ORA (then make gene lists readable)
ekegg <- enrichKEGG(gene = sig_genes, universe = gene_universe,
                    organism = kegg_code, keyType = "ncbi-geneid",
                    pAdjustMethod = "BH")
if (!is.null(ekegg) && nrow(as.data.frame(ekegg)) > 0)
  ekegg <- setReadable(ekegg, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")

## 4c. Reactome ORA
ereact <- enrichPathway(gene = sig_genes, universe = gene_universe,
                        organism = species_name, pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                        readable = TRUE)

## 5.  GSEA (preranked)  -------------------------------------------------------
ranks <- tbl %>% arrange(desc(logFC)) %>%
         transmute(ENTREZID, rnk = logFC) %>% tibble::deframe()

gsea_go <- gseGO(geneList = ranks, OrgDb = orgDb, ont = "BP",
                 pAdjustMethod = "BH")
if (!is.null(gsea_go) && nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go)) > 0)
  gsea_go <- setReadable(gsea_go, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")

## 6.  PREPARE DATA FRAMES WITH “Genes” COLUMN  -------------------------------
mk_df <- function(res_obj, id_col = "geneID") {
  if (is.null(res_obj) || nrow(as.data.frame(res_obj)) == 0) return(data.frame())
  as.data.frame(res_obj) %>%
    rename(Genes = !!id_col)  # clear, human-readable name
}

df_GO      <- mk_df(ego,      "geneID")
df_React   <- mk_df(ereact,   "geneID")
df_KEGG    <- mk_df(ekegg,    "geneID")
df_GSEA_GO <- mk_df(gsea_go,  "core_enrichment")

## 7.  WRITE EXCEL (now with Genes column)  -----------------------------------
write.xlsx(
  list(GO_ORA   = df_GO,
       KEGG_ORA = df_KEGG,
       Reactome = df_React,
       GO_GSEA  = df_GSEA_GO),
  file      = "output/enrichment_results_with_genes.xlsx",
  overwrite = TRUE
)

## 8.  QUICK DOT-PLOTS (unchanged)  -------------------------------------------
pdf("output/dotplots.pdf", width = 9, height = 6)
if (nrow(df_GO))      dotplot(ego,      showCategory = 15, title = "GO BP ORA")
if (nrow(df_KEGG))    dotplot(ekegg,    showCategory = 15, title = "KEGG ORA")
if (nrow(df_React))   dotplot(ereact,   showCategory = 15, title = "Reactome ORA")
if (nrow(df_GSEA_GO)) dotplot(gsea_go,  showCategory = 15, title = "GO GSEA (preranked)")
dev.off()

## 9.  OPTIONAL: KEGG PATHVIEW  -----------------------------------------------
if (nrow(df_KEGG)) {
  top_pathway <- ekegg$ID[1]
  pathview(gene.data  = setNames(tbl$logFC, tbl$ENTREZID),
           pathway.id = top_pathway, species = kegg_code,
           out.suffix = "logFC", kegg.native = TRUE)
}

cat("\n✓ All done!  Check the 'output/' folder for the new Excel file with gene lists.\n")

```
